content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.14%, Bank Nifty -1.14%, VIX +10.93% to 18.68 — risk-off opening with broad weakness. Auto -1.85%, Realty -1.97%, PSU Bank -1.61% leading down; IT relatively resilient. Existing book is heavily deployed (65%) with 15 CNC positions; priority is position management — trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.9%, COFORGE +8.9%) and respect existing SLs on losers rather than panic-exit (Rule 17). VIX spike + binary CPI Tuesday argues against fresh admits today.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +9.9% unrealized at 1081.60, SL 1073.10 already trailed above breakeven. Current SL gap is only ~0.8% below CMP — at the boundary of the 1% trail-gap discipline (Rule, trail-gap). Holding SL at 1073.10 (no change). This is a HOLD on existing SL; emitting as confirmation since no tightening warranted today without forcing self-stopout. Actually correcting to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override: SL at 1073.10 is 0.8% below CMP 1081.60 — already tight, tightening further violates 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 beat, brokerage upgrades to 1350, bullish momentum intact. Let it run toward target 1135."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.1% at 123.77, SL 121.00 (-2.2% below CMP). VIX +10.93% supports gold hedge thesis. SL intact, no new info to change posture."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +1.8% at 834.85, SL at entry 820 already (breakeven). Q4 beat, raised FY27 guidance, FMCG rotation playing out. SL is 1.78% below CMP — within trail-gap limits. Holding current SL/target; no-op MODIFY converted to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +8.9% at 1370.90, SL 1352 = 1.4% below CMP — within 1% trail-gap floor barely. IT defensive on weak rupee, Q4 strong, order book +30% YoY. Already trailed close to CMP; further tightening risks self-stopout. Let it run toward 1420 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GRSE -1.4% at 2981.60, SL 3000 — wait, SL 3000 is ABOVE CMP 2981.60. Re-checking: SL 3000 vs CMP 2981.60 — SL is above CMP, position already effectively stopped. This will trigger on next print. Original SL placement at 3000 from entry 3025 = -0.8% SL, very tight. Defense thesis intact (FY26 PAT +41.8%, Rs 17k cr order book). Letting SL fire if hit per Rule 17 — do not pre-empt own stop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CAMS +2.4% at 825.40, SL 820 already at near-breakeven (0.7% below CMP). Q4 record revenue, dividend ex-date July, investor meets May 15/26/27. SL gap below 1% trail-floor — no further tightening. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND -2.7% at 1449.30, SL 1465 — SL is ABOVE CMP. Position effectively at SL trigger. Q4 PAT +37% YoY, UVG 15.3%, EBITDA margin +310bps. Per Rule 17, do not pre-empt own SL; let it fire if hit, recovery option intact given strong fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF -0.5% at 2770.50, SL 2755 = 0.6% below CMP — very tight, within trail-floor. Q4 PAT +47%, Rs 2300 cr capex announced. Thesis intact, let SL work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.5% at 9056.50, SL 9020 = 0.4% below CMP. Q4 record revenue, dividend Rs 47, market share gains. Hold; SL at trail-floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BHARATFORG -1.7% at 1980.90, SL 1955 = 1.3% below CMP. Defense order book Rs 10,961 cr, FY27 guidance 25% growth. Thesis intact, SL fine."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -2.5% at 355.20, SL 354 = 0.3% below CMP — very close. NBFC weakness today on BFSI risk-off. Q4 PAT +30.6% strong, Macquarie target 415. Per Rule 17, do not pre-empt SL; if it fires, max loss is per original sizing. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -2.2% at 10526, SL 10440 = 0.8% below CMP. Q4 strong, buyback at 12000, record volumes. Auto sector weak today (-1.85%). SL intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.2% at 480.90, SL 472 = 1.9% below CMP. Q4 PAT +16% YoY, raised FY27 guidance, FMCG rotation in play (+3.77% pre-mkt earlier). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +0.5% at 1232.20, SL 1190 = 3.4% below CMP. Q4 results pending in May (binary event). Already held, can't unwind without prior commitment. Hold to SL; consider trim if approaches result date."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },

    },

    },

  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH research candidates not admitted today and reasons: (1) THERMAX, NUVAMA, CRAFTSMAN — pre-market spikes already extended, chasing into a -1.14% Nifty + VIX +10.93% tape is poor R:R. (2) DABUR, BERGEPAINT, TITAN, APOLLOHOSP — sector themes already represented in book (DABUR/MARICO/PIDILITIND for FMCG/consumer; WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS for pharma). (3) PERSISTENT, INFY, HCLTECH — IT exposure already via COFORGE; no need to stack IT cluster (Rule 10). (4) CAMS already held; not adding. (5) ABCAPITAL already held; BFSI cluster cap-aware. (6) BAJAJ-AUTO already held; auto -1.85% suggests no add today. (7) FINCABLES — POLYCAB already represents cables theme. (8) NBCC — PSU construction; no current sector slot. (9) HFC L1 candidate already pending via PNBHOUSING. Deployment at 65% (sub-80% soft target) but admitting into a high-VIX risk-off open with 15 existing positions to manage = poor incremental R:R. Will re-evaluate post-CPI (Tuesday).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed (65%, 15 positions) — concentration risk is real. Today's job is position-management, not admits. VIX +10.93% + Nifty -1.14% + auto/realty/PSU-bank carnage = capital-preservation regime. Several positions (GRSE, PIDILITIND, ABCAPITAL) have SLs at or above CMP and may trigger today; per Rule 17 I do not pre-empt those — the SL was sized as the worst-case loss. CANCEL pending HFCL MIS BUY: order placed >124 hours ago (7475 minutes), thesis stale, BFSI risk-off today makes a fresh microcap-NBFC long inappropriate.",
  "decisions_addendum": "CANCEL HFCL pending order — but engine schema doesn't have CANCEL action; noting in portfolio_notes."
}
